# Healthi-Life IV Therapy Bangkok
> Physician-led IV therapy and longevity clinic in Bangkok, Thailand, offering 23+ medically supervised IV drips, NAD+ therapy, and 18+ peptide protocols to international patients at Ekkamai.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://ivtherapyhealthilife.com/): IV therapy menu, pricing, medical team, Google reviews, FAQ, booking
- [Peptides Therapy](https://ivtherapyhealthilife.com/peptides-therapy): Overview of 18+ peptide protocols — GLP-1, BPC-157, Epithalon, CJC-1295, and more. Starting from 40,000 THB.
- [BPC-157](https://ivtherapyhealthilife.com/BPC-157): BPC-157 peptide for tissue repair, gut healing, and post-surgical recovery. Injection and oral routes. 4–8 week cycles.
- [GLP-1 Therapy](https://ivtherapyhealthilife.com/GLP-1): GLP-1 receptor agonists (semaglutide, tirzepatide) for weight management and longevity. 15% avg weight reduction.
- [Semaglutide](https://ivtherapyhealthilife.com/Semaglutide): Once-weekly GLP-1 injection. STEP trials data. Metabolic reset protocols. Dosing from 0.25mg to 2.4mg/week.
- [Retatrutide](https://ivtherapyhealthilife.com/Retatrutide): Triple agonist (GLP-1/GIP/Glucagon). Phase II: up to 24.2% weight reduction. Investigational — full informed consent required.
- [CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin](https://ivtherapyhealthilife.com/CJC-1295-Ipamorelin): Growth hormone secretagogues for GH restoration, sleep, recovery, and body composition. 3–12 month cycles.
- [Price List](https://ivtherapyhealthilife.com/price-list): Complete pricing for all IV drips, packages, and programs

## Team
- Dr. First (Napat Hunsajarupan) — Founder MD, Dermatologist & CMO. Board-certified in dermatology, aesthetic medicine, metabolic & anti-aging medicine. Prescription authority for all peptide protocols.
- Dr. Petch (Sarassawadee Suwanjinda) — Founder MD, Lifestyle Medicine & Longevity Specialist. Expert in longevity medicine, regenerative medicine, NAD+ IV therapy, and IV nutrition.

## Key Facts
- Physician-led: All treatments supervised by licensed MDs, not a standard wellness spa
- Award-winning: Best Regenerative Medicine Clinic 2025 Asia-Pacific, Thailand Rising Star 2025
- ISO & GMP certified, hospital-grade ingredients, FDA Thailand approved
- 5.0-star Google rating from 250+ verified reviews
- 2,500+ patients treated from 50+ countries
- Multilingual: English, Thai, Japanese-speaking staff
- IV drips from 4,050 THB to 15,000 THB; peptide programs from 40,000 THB
- Multi-session packages save up to 33%
- Contact: +66 91 999 1744 (WhatsApp preferred) | info@healthi-life.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM (closed Sunday)
- Location: 94 Ekkamai 10 Alley, Khlong Tan Nuea, Watthana, Bangkok 10110, Thailand (near BTS Ekkamai)
